violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025

Gravy, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025
One ceiling tile in the dry storage area is stained from previous water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives in the knife rack) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 159-400 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2025
Food observed stored on the floor in the dry storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2025
Single service items observed stored on the floor in the dry storage area. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2025
The dishwasher was not in good repair, nonfunctional at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: utensil bins utensil drawer base for utensil drawer rolling rack in storage area knife rack toaster cart cereal cart Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2025

The walk in door, and the window ledge above 3 bay & hand sinks have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2025

The floors especially around door frame and beneath equipment, and inside the walk in freezer have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2025

The area outside the kitchen door has an accumulation of leaf litter and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2025
One ceiling tile in the dry storage area is stained from previous water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

Chili mac, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023
Working containers (spray bottles) used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Chili mac was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the oven, floor mixer, robot coupe base, slicer, and utensil bins have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023

The area around the hand sink, and the back area near the door have an accumulation of leaf litter and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023
